Interactive Learning Hub

Designing Workflows
for Agentic AI

Sixteen interactive activities across the eight modules of the two-day short course. Select a module below to launch an activity full-screen in the room.

Day one Modules 1 – 5
Day two Modules 5 – 8
1
Day one · 9.20 – 10.50

Understanding Agentic AI

How agentic systems plan, act and adapt independently — compared with traditional automation and generative AI.

Simulation

Onboarding Simulator

Watch one new-hire trigger handled three ways: traditional, generative and agentic.

Launch
Explorer

The Autonomy Slider

Slide from “human does everything” to “fully autonomous” and see what changes — then bust three myths.

Launch
2
Day one · 11.05 – 12.05

Understanding Agentic AI Risks

Operational, ethical and governance risks — accountability gaps, automation bias and downstream impacts.

Simulation

The Cascade Machine

Inject one small error and watch it propagate at machine speed — then contain it with a checkpoint.

Launch
Case Study

Moffatt v Air Canada

Evidence appears card by card. Vote on who is accountable before the tribunal’s ruling is revealed.

Launch
3
Day one · 12.05 – 13.05

Safe Deployment of AI

Decision boundaries: what can be delegated, what stays human-led, and where accountability cannot transfer.

Sorting Game

Draw the Line

Drag decision cards into “AI decides”, “AI recommends” or “human only” — with instant feedback.

Launch
Story

Boundary Drift Detector

An AI’s remit quietly expands over six months. Tap the moment it drifted — most people miss it.

Launch
4
Day one · 13.50 – 14.50

Determining Tasks & Decisions

Four task categories, the 5P delegation framework, and graduated autonomy as risk and ambiguity change.

Wizard

5P Delegation Wizard

Assess a task from your own work through the five Ps and get a shareable delegation verdict.

Launch
Stress Test

The Autonomy Elevator

Place scenarios on four autonomy levels — then survive the ambiguity and stakes stress-tests.

Launch
5
Day one 15.05 – Day two 10.30

Mapping End-to-End Workflows

Actions, decision points and handovers — mapping current state, designing future state, designing for failure.

Builder

Workflow Builder

Snap together actions, decision points and handovers on a swim-lane canvas. Then hit “redesign”.

Launch
Simulation

Design for Failure

Your workflow hits a failure mode — silent, uncertain, or out of bounds. Respond under pressure.

Launch
6
Day two · 10.45 – 12.00

Intervention for Accountability

Escalation paths, checkpoints and overrides — managing five exception types across interacting agents.

Game

The Control Room

You are the human above the loop. Exceptions fire — escalate, checkpoint, override or stop. Scored.

Launch
Puzzle

Handoff Inspector

Rebuild a terrible AI-to-human handoff into the ideal one — what to include, what to cut.

Launch
7
Day two · 13.00 – 14.00

Governance

The six components of a living governance system and six guardrail types for ongoing oversight.

Self-Assessment

Governance Health Check

Rate your organisation on six components — a live radar chart reveals your weakest link.

Launch
Matching Game

Guardrail Match

Match six guardrail types to real incidents against the clock. Which control would have caught it?

Launch
8
Day two · 14.15 – 17.00

From Pilots to Workflows

The five-stage journey from pilot to governed workflow — kill criteria and production design decisions.

Branching Story

Pilot-to-Production Journey

Review a fictional pilot at each gate — proceed, kill or fix. Your votes change the ending.

Launch
Scorecard

Readiness Scorecard

Configure the four production design decisions for your use case and get a traffic-light verdict.

Launch
